description_long: This object consists of four small, round bowls arranged in a loose cluster, each with a wide opening and a gently tapering base. The bowls have a marbled, earthy coloration with swirling patterns in shades of tan, brown, and hints of green, giving them a natural, handcrafted appearance. The surfaces appear slightly glossy, suggesting a glazed ceramic finish. Each bowl is paired with a flat, circular white ring, possibly serving as a coaster or base, which contrasts with the organic tones of the bowls. The bowls are empty and their interiors are visible, showing the same marbled pattern as the exterior. There are no visible handles, lids, or additional decorative elements beyond the swirling surface motif.
description: A set of four marbled ceramic bowls with wide openings and glossy surfaces, each paired with a white circular base. The bowls feature earthy, swirling patterns and appear handcrafted.
description_view_0: Four marbled bowls are seen from above, showing their wide openings and the white circular bases beneath each bowl.
description_view_1: The bowls are viewed from a diagonal angle, highlighting their rounded sides and the depth of the bowls, with the white bases partially visible.
description_view_2: A front-facing view displays the bowls' open tops and the arrangement of the white bases, emphasizing the marbled pattern on the exterior.
description_view_3: A close, angled view accentuates the curvature and marbled texture of the bowls, with the white bases clearly visible beneath.
attribute_context_of_use: serving or holding small portions of food, such as snacks or condiments
attribute_decorative_patterns: marbled swirling patterns in earthy tones covering the entire exterior and interior surfaces
